components.name: ChartKit
components.description: Main chart rendering component that selects and renders a plugin-based chart based on type. Wraps content in ErrorBoundary and React.Suspense with a Loader fallback. Accepts a forwarded ref for imperative reflow control.

props.name: type
props.description: Chart plugin type identifier used to select the rendering plugin

props.name: data
props.description: Chart data payload, shape depends on the selected plugin type

props.name: id
props.description: Optional chart instance ID. A random ID is generated if not provided

props.name: isMobile
props.description: Enables mobile-optimized rendering mode

props.name: onLoad
props.description: Callback fired when chart data is loaded

props.name: onRender
props.description: Fires on each chartkit plugin's component render

props.name: onChartLoad
props.description: Fires on chartkit plugin's component mount

props.name: onError
props.description: Fires in case of unhandled plugin's exception

props.name: renderError
props.description: Used to render user's error component

props.name: renderPluginLoader
props.description: Used to render user's plugin loader component

props.name: validation
props.description: Validation options. seriesCountLimit sets a series count limit (gravity-charts plugin only); exceeding it throws ERR.CK.TOO_MANY_LINES

components.name: ErrorBoundary
components.description: React error boundary that catches rendering errors in chart plugins. Automatically resets on data changes for NO_DATA and INVALID_DATA errors. Supports custom error rendering via renderError prop.

props.name: children
props.description: Child components to wrap with error boundary

props.name: onError
props.description: Callback fired when an error is caught

props.name: data
props.description: Chart data used to detect data changes and auto-reset certain error states

props.name: renderError
props.description: Custom error renderer receiving error, message, and resetError callback

components.name: Loader
components.description: Loading indicator component used as a React.Suspense fallback. Wraps the base Gravity UI Loader and supports custom plugin loader rendering.

props.name: renderPluginLoader
props.description: Optional function returning a custom loader element. When provided, replaces the default loader

props.name: size
props.description: Loader size, inherited from base Gravity UI LoaderProps

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class name, inherited from base Gravity UI LoaderProps

components.name: SplitPane
components.description: Resizable split pane layout component supporting horizontal and vertical splits with drag-to-resize functionality. Based on react-split-pane.

props.name: allowResize
props.description: Whether the pane divider can be dragged to resize

props.name: children
props.description: Two child elements to render in the split panes

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the container

props.name: primary
props.description: Which pane is the primary (sized) pane

props.name: minSize
props.description: Minimum size of the primary pane in pixels

props.name: maxSize
props.description: Maximum size of the primary pane in pixels

props.name: defaultSize
props.description: Initial default size of the primary pane

props.name: size
props.description: Controlled size of the primary pane

props.name: split
props.description: Split orientation: 'vertical' (left/right) or 'horizontal' (top/bottom)

props.name: onDragStarted
props.description: Callback fired when drag-to-resize begins

props.name: onDragFinished
props.description: Callback fired when drag-to-resize ends with the final size

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback fired continuously during drag with the current size

props.name: onResizerClick
props.description: Click handler for the resizer element

props.name: onResizerDoubleClick
props.description: Double-click handler for the resizer element

props.name: style
props.description: Custom styles for the container

props.name: resizerStyle
props.description: Custom styles for the resizer element

props.name: paneClassName
props.description: CSS class applied to both panes

props.name: pane1ClassName
props.description: CSS class applied to the first pane only

props.name: pane2ClassName
props.description: CSS class applied to the second pane only

props.name: paneStyle
props.description: Custom styles applied to both panes

props.name: pane1Style
props.description: Custom styles for the first pane only

props.name: pane2Style
props.description: Custom styles for the second pane only

props.name: resizerClassName
props.description: CSS class for the resizer element

props.name: step
props.description: Snap step size in pixels for resize increments

components.name: StyledSplitPane
components.description: A styled wrapper around SplitPane with built-in BEM CSS classes and touch hover effects on the resizer. Accepts render functions for each pane.

props.name: paneOneRender
props.description: Render function for the first pane content

props.name: paneTwoRender
props.description: Render function for the second pane content

props.name: allowResize
props.description: Whether the pane divider can be dragged to resize (inherited from SplitPaneProps)

props.name: split
props.description: Split orientation (inherited from SplitPaneProps)

props.name: minSize
props.description: Minimum pane size in pixels (inherited from SplitPaneProps)

props.name: maxSize
props.description: Maximum pane size in pixels (inherited from SplitPaneProps)

props.name: defaultSize
props.description: Initial default size of the primary pane (inherited from SplitPaneProps)

props.name: size
props.description: Controlled size of the primary pane (inherited from SplitPaneProps)

props.name: onDragStarted
props.description: Callback fired when drag begins (inherited from SplitPaneProps)

props.name: onDragFinished
props.description: Callback fired when drag ends (inherited from SplitPaneProps)

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback during drag (inherited from SplitPaneProps)

components.name: Pane
components.description: Individual pane component used inside SplitPane. Renders a flex container that adapts its sizing based on the split direction.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class name for the pane

props.name: children
props.description: Content to render inside the pane

props.name: size
props.description: Fixed size (width for vertical split, height for horizontal)

props.name: split
props.description: Split direction affecting how the size prop is applied

props.name: style
props.description: Custom inline styles for the pane

props.name: eleRef
props.description: Ref callback for the underlying DOM element

components.name: Resizer
components.description: Draggable resizer handle component used between panes in SplitPane. Handles mouse and touch events for resize interactions.

props.name: onMouseDown
props.description: Mouse down handler to initiate resize

props.name: onTouchStart
props.description: Touch start handler for mobile resize

props.name: onTouchEnd
props.description: Touch end handler to finish mobile resize

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the resizer

props.name: split
props.description: Split direction for styling the resizer orientation

props.name: style
props.description: Custom inline styles for the resizer

props.name: resizerClassName
props.description: Base CSS class name for the resizer element

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click handler for the resizer

props.name: onDoubleClick
props.description: Double-click handler for the resizer

hooks.name: usePrevious

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The value to track across renders

hooks.description: Returns the previous value of the given argument from the last render cycle. Uses a ref internally to store the prior value.
